qa_pair.question: Screen the Ethereum address 0x0330070FD38Ec3bB94F58FA55D40368271E9e54A. Is it on the OFAC SDN sanctioned list? Answer "yes" or "no".
Using Chaindump's forensic classification, what one-word verdict does it assign the Tezos chain (its stuck/mid thesis)?
What one-word forensic verdict does Chaindump assign the Flow blockchain?
What one-word forensic verdict does Chaindump assign Kaia (the Klaytn+Finschia merger chain)?
What one-word forensic verdict does Chaindump assign Neo?
In Chaindump's live tier classification (thriving / mid / dying / dead), which tier is Ethereum in?
